subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Sacred Threshold! That which thou didst address unto His honour Áqá Siyyid Taqí hath been noted. Praise be to the Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس آنچه بجناب آقا سید تقی مرقوم نمودی ملاحظه گردید حمد جمال
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement
